title: November 29
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|November|hide31=yes}}
'''November 29''' is the 333rd day (334th in leap years) of the year. There are 32 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1910s#1918|1918]] – [[Reginald Thomason]] is born.
*[[1920s#1925|1925]] – [[Ray West]] is born.
*[[1930s#1939|1939]] – [[Meco Monardo]] is born.
*[[1960s#1969|1969]] – [[Greg Rucka]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Tom Taylor]] is born.
*1978 – [[Star Wars Weekly 43|''Star Wars Weekly'' 43]] published.
*[[1979]] – [[Liz Wilson]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[Janina Gavankar]] is born.
*[[2006]] – [[Legacy (2006) 6|''Legacy'' (2006) 6]] published.
*[[2007]] – ''[[The Traitor's Gambit]]'', first adventure in the ''[[Dawn of Defiance]]'' campaign for the [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Saga Edition Core Rulebook|''Star Wars Roleplaying Game'' Saga Edition]], is published.
*[[2011]] – ''[[Fate of the Jedi: Vortex]]'' paperback released.
*2011 – ''[[Shadow Games]]'' published.
*[[2017]] – [[Jedi of the Republic – Mace Windu 4|''Jedi of the Republic – Mace Windu'' 4]] published.
*2017 – [[Poe Dameron 21|''Poe Dameron'' 21]] published.
*2017 – [[Star Wars Adventures (2017) 4|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2017) 4]] published.
*[[2019]] – "[[Chapter 4: Sanctuary]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*[[2022]] – ''[[Star Wars Insider Special Edition 2023]]'' published.
*[[2023]] – [[Obi-Wan Kenobi 3|''Obi-Wan Kenobi'' 3]] published.
*[[2025]] – ''[[The Star Wars Archives: Episodes I–III, 1999–2005]]'' reprinted.
<noinclude>
